memory.summary: I planned to finish the assignment, but a friend invited me to lunch. With low energy and high stress, I might skip the work to eat first.
The missing 'assignment_A' confirms my lunch plan was correct; I can no longer work on it today.
I worked 2 hours on the analysis section, improving progress to 0.58, while friends confirmed they are about to order lunch.
The task 'assignment_A' does not exist, confirming I cannot work on it. My lunch plan is valid as the missing file was the only blocker.
I made significant progress on the analysis section, but it is now critically close to its deadline without being finished.
I finished the analysis section just as its deadline passed, but I still have 2 hours of sleep debt and high stress.
I completed the analysis section but missed the reading deadline. My stress is high and I am still behind on sleep.
I have no remaining tasks to complete, yet my stress and sleep debt remain critically high from previous deadlines.
Waiting did not reduce my stress or sleep debt. I remain critically behind on rest despite having no active tasks.
I confirmed 'assignment_A' is unavailable, but my stress and sleep debt remain critically high with no tasks to alleviate them.
Waiting for 'assignment_A' did not lower my stress or sleep debt. I remain critically behind on rest despite having no active tasks.
Working on the analysis section slightly improved my progress, yet my high stress and sleep debt remain unchanged despite active effort.
